tools.name: describe_catalog
tools.description: Free discovery: symbols, timeframes, ranges, pricing, quality legend.

tools.name: get_bars
tools.description: Quality-flagged OHLCV candles. Priced per 1,000 candles.

tools.name: get_features
tools.description: Documented leakage-safe feature matrix rows. Priced per call.

tools.name: build_bundle
tools.description: Signed URL for a dataset SKU. Packs: crypto|equities ($59 each), everything ($149: both packs + all token sequences, $730 list), tokens ($18/symbol), dataset (per-symbol OHLCV, crypto $14 / equity $5), mtf (aligned multi-timeframe bundle $9, crypto only), features (feature matrix, crypto $7 / equity

tools.name: get_regime_label
tools.description: Descriptive market-state label (trend/range × calm/vol quadrant) for the most recent completed bar at or before a timestamp. Not a prediction.

tools.name: get_funding
tools.description: Perp funding-rate settlement history from listing date (checksummed archive).

tools.name: get_open_interest
tools.description: Hourly open interest with per-row quality flags (verified archive + flagged bridge).

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Context series: fear_greed_1d, VIX_1d, DXY_1d, TNX_1d, DJI_1d.

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Curated macro/crypto events (FOMC w/ surprise, halvings, incidents) in a range.

tools.name: get_orderflow
tools.description: Taker buy/sell imbalance, trade counts, quote volume (1h/1d via API; denser tiers in packs). buy_ratio 0.5 = balanced.

tools.name: validate_backtest_data
tools.description: Quality report for a dataset spec before you backtest on it: coverage, per-bar quality distribution, gaps, and concrete warnings.
